tools.name: v1Company.companyAlternativeSearch
tools.description: KYC API company index lookup by country and mixed parameters. This function requires a country code then a mixture of name

tools.name: v1Company.companyAnnouncement
tools.description: Request full announcement data identified by announcement id

tools.name: v1Company.companyDeepsearchIsin
tools.description: Lookup stock exchange listings identified by an ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) number. Search is forwarded to a provider.

tools.name: v1Company.companyDeepsearchLei
tools.description: Lookup companies identified by a LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) number. Search is forwarded to a provider.

tools.name: v1Company.companyDeepsearchName
tools.description: Search for companies with a certain name. Search is forwarded to the respective business register of the country.

tools.name: v1Company.companyDeepsearchNumber
tools.description: Search for companies with a certain register number. Search is forwarded to the respective business register of the country.

tools.name: v1Company.companyIdAnnouncements
tools.description: Search announcements filed to the business register from a company identified by an id

tools.name: v1Company.companyIdDataset
tools.description: Get company details by id. The level of details is defined by the dataset parameter

tools.name: v1Company.companyIdSuper
tools.description: Request company superdata identified by company id

tools.name: v1Company.companyMonitorChangeTypesList
tools.description: Get current list of available ChangeTypes to subscribe to

tools.name: v1Company.companyMonitorId
tools.description: Query status of registered monitors for a specific company identified by a company id

tools.name: v1Company.companyMonitorList
tools.description: Query list of all registered monitors for logged in user

tools.name: v1Company.companyMonitorRegister
tools.description: Add a company to your perpetual monitoring list and register a callback URL to get monitoring alerts.

tools.name: v1Company.companyMonitorUnregister
tools.description: Deactivate a previously registered company monitor identified by the notifier id

tools.name: v1Company.companyNotificationId
tools.description: Query list of registered notifications for a specific company identified by a company id

tools.name: v1Company.companyNotificationList
tools.description: Query list of registered callback URLs for logged in user

tools.name: v1Company.companyNotificationRegister
tools.description: Register a new callback URL to get notifications about companies.

tools.name: v1Company.companyNotificationUnregister
tools.description: Deactivate a previously registered company monitor identified by the notifier id

tools.name: v1Company.companySearchName
tools.description: KYC API company index lookup for companies with a certain name in a country.

tools.name: v1Company.companySearchNumber
tools.description: KYC API company index lookup for companies with a certain register number in a country.

tools.name: v1EinVerification.einVerificationBasic
tools.description: Performs a basic verification check of a given EIN tax number.

tools.name: v1EinVerification.einVerificationComprehensive
tools.description: Comprehensive verification of a given EIN number. Additionally to the basic verification it will lookup company details

tools.name: v1EinVerification.einVerificationLookup
tools.description: Lookup EIN number for a company by its company name

tools.name: v1IbanVerification.ibanBasic
tools.description: Basic verification of an IBAN number validating its structure

tools.name: v1IbanVerification.ibanComprehensive
tools.description: Comprehensive verification of IBAN number using a service provider for verification

tools.name: v1NifVerification.nifBasic
tools.description: Performs a basic verification check of a given NIF tax number against NIF.com. Optional parameters may be added to improve calculation of confidence score.

tools.name: v1NifVerification.nifComprehensive
tools.description: Comprehensive verification of given portuguese NIF number against NIF.com. Optional parameters may help to build a better confidence score. Additional company data will be provided.

tools.name: v1Pepsanction.pepMonitorList
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all active Pep Sanction Report monitors for this account

tools.name: v1Pepsanction.pepMonitorUnregister
tools.description: Unregister a previously created Pep Sanction Report Monitor

tools.name: v1Pepsanction.pepMonitorUpdate
tools.description: Update the webhook URL of an active Pep Sanction Report Monitor

tools.name: v1Pepsanction.pepOrder
tools.description: Order a new Pep Sanction Check by providing either a business or person name with some additional optional parameters.

tools.name: v1Pepsanction.pepRetrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a completed Pep Sanction check structured or in pdf depending on given accept header

tools.name: v1Product.productAvailability
tools.description: Check availability and valid options for a particular product for a particular company identfied by its id

tools.name: v1Product.productCatalog
tools.description: Returns a catalog of purchasable products available with some metadata for a particular country

tools.name: v1Product.productNotifier
tools.description: Queries and returns all metadata associated with a notifier identified by its notifer id

tools.name: v1Product.productNotifierCreate
tools.description: Create a notifier for a particular order. Parameters can be supplied in the path

tools.name: v1Product.productOrder
tools.description: Place an order for a particular product identified by its SKU for a particular company identified by its id

tools.name: v1Product.productOrderConcierge
tools.description: Place an order for a concierge product

tools.name: v1Product.productOrderUbo
tools.description: Place an order for a UBO (ultimate beneficial owner) discovery report

tools.name: v1Product.productOrderWithOption
tools.description: Place an order for a particular product identified by its SKU with a particular option for a particular company identified by its id

tools.name: v1Product.productRetrieve
tools.description: Retrieves the document or structured data associated with a completed order identified with its order id

tools.name: v1Product.productSearch
tools.description: Search for possible products for a particular company identified by its id

tools.name: v1Product.productStatus
tools.description: Retrieve the current status of an order identified by its order id

tools.name: v1Product.productUpdateAction
tools.description: Update an existing order identified by its order id

tools.name: v1System.healthCheck
tools.description: Returns the health information for the official business registers based on usage.

tools.name: v1System.systemCountries
tools.description: Retrieve the list of all currently enabled countries

tools.name: v1System.systemPricelist
tools.description: Retrieve pricing rules for your subscription plan

tools.name: v1TinVerification.tinVerificationBasicCheck
tools.description: Performs a basic verification check of a given TIN number and name.

tools.name: v1TinVerification.tinVerificationComprehensiveCheck
tools.description: Performs an EIN name match using provided TIN Number. Additionally to the name lookup it will lookup company details

tools.name: v1TinVerification.tinVerificationNameLookup
tools.description: Performs an EIN name match using provided TIN Number

tools.name: v1VatVerification.vatBasic
tools.description: Basic verification of given VAT number against VIES. Optional parameters may help to build a better confidence score.

tools.name: v1VatVerification.vatComprehensive
tools.description: Extended verification of given VAT number against VIES. Optional parameters may help to build a better confidence score.

tools.name: v1VatVerification.vatLevelTwo
tools.description: Second Level Verification of VAT number against BMF Austria. Optional confirmation parameter can be provided to order a Confirmation Report.

tools.name: v1VatVerification.vatLookup
tools.description: Reverse VAT Lookup: Search for companies and their VAT numbers by company name. Search is forwarded to a provider.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
